Validation Test Fixture

Used by common-keywords/tests/. Each field below exercises one validation behavior.

This field is required.
Too many characters.
Username must be between 3 and 8 characters.
Only letters are allowed.
Angle brackets are not permitted.
Please enter a valid email.
Please enter a valid phone number.
Please enter a valid URL.
HTTPS is required.
Please enter a valid number.
Integers only, please.
Must be positive.
Enter an amount like $12.34.
Must be 0-100.
Enter a valid date.
Must be a future date.
Must be a past date.
Start date must be before end date.
Password does not meet the basic policy.
Password does not meet the strong policy.
Password does not meet the banking policy.
Passwords do not match.
File not allowed (wrong type or too large).
0 files selected.
Please select a country.
  • Vietnam
  • United States
  • Japan
  • United Kingdom
UI state
Always visible.
Initially hidden.
Submit-gated form (button disabled until both filled)
Preservation test (hide → show retains inputs)
Accessibility
Priority
Severity

Please fill all mandatory fields before submitting.
